title: cerastium papuanum subsp. phaenops
intro: Cerastium papuanum subsp. phaenops, also known as Phaenopapua, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cerastium papuanum subsp. phaenops include its use as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying the leaves and flowers to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
